definition:
1. round, spherical , (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; λίθοι στρ. pebbles , (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. circular , (Plato Philosophus) 
3. round, compactly formed , (Xenophon Historicus) 
4. of ships, στρ. ναῦς, στρ. πλοῖον, a merchant- ship, from its round shape , as opposite to the long narrow ship-of-war  μακρὰ ναῦς); (Herdotus Historicus), etc. 
5. metaphorically of phrases, well-rounded, compact, pithy, terse , (Aristophanes Comicus):—;adverb, στρογγυλώτατα as tersely as possible , (Aristotle Philosopher) (ML)
